free_text: Inelastic alpha-particle scattering at intermediate
energy
The Saclay Synchrotron SATURNE to a final
energy of 1370 MeV
The energy-loss spectrometer facility SPES I
was used to detect the scattered alpha particles
Absolute error
Digitizing error
The graphic bars include errors due to
statistics,background substraction, substraction of the
contribution of contaminating isotopes, and the finite
apperture of the angular bins (deconvolution procedure)
Digitizing error
The bombarded targets were isotopically enriched foils
of 40Ca(99.9%). The size of the targets was 6 mm wide
and 20 mm high, thickness wwas 200 mg/cm**2.
